dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3187 IS: Bivens Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Whitehouse (for himself, Mr. Padilla, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Markey, Mr. Welch, and Ms. Hirono) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To provide a civil remedy for an individual whose rights have been violated by a person acting under Federal authority, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Bivens Act of 2025.

section.header: Civil action against person acting under Federal authority
section.text: Section 1979 of the Revised Statutes (42 U.S.C. 1983) is amended by inserting of the United States or before of any State.
